definition: Average weekly share of team targets for the player.
Average weekly share of team air yards for the player.
Average weekly weighted opportunity rating for receivers.
Average passer air conversion ratio context from player stats.
Average receiver air conversion ratio context from player stats.
Attempts-weighted average completion percentage over expected for QBs.
Team regular-season pass attempts in the player's team context.
Team regular-season carries in the player's team context.
Team regular-season targets in the player's team context.
Team pass attempts plus carries, used as a volume proxy.
Team pass attempts divided by pass attempts plus carries.
Team passing EPA divided by pass attempts.
Team rushing EPA divided by carries.
Team receiving EPA divided by targets.
Team passing EPA plus rushing EPA; avoids adding receiving EPA to reduce double counting.
Player targets divided by team targets.
Player carries divided by team carries.
Player carries plus receptions divided by team carries plus receptions.
Player receiving air yards divided by team receiving air yards.
Player pass attempts plus carries divided by team pass attempts plus carries.
Average rest days in the player's games.
Average rest days minus opponent rest days.
Average closing spread from the player's team perspective; negative generally means favored.
Average game total betting line.
Share of the player's games played at home.
Share of games where the player's team was favored by the spread.
Share of games against division opponents.
Share of games in domed or closed-roof conditions.
Share of games listed as outdoors.
Share of games on grass surfaces.
Share of games on turf or artificial surfaces.
Average listed game temperature where available.
Average listed game wind speed where available.
